common.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

auth.title: Sign in as yourself
auth.subtitle: Use your GitHub account to bring your wellness engine into the app.
auth.waiting: Waiting for you to authorize on GitHub…
auth.errorHint: The wellness API rejected the request. Make sure the API is running and that a GitHub OAuth app with device flow enabled is configured.
auth.devHint: Local development only. Mints a token for a test user.

callback.title: Finishing GitHub sign-in
callback.redirecting: You're signed in. Taking you home…
callback.errorDescription: The callback was invalid or expired. Try signing in again.
callback.missingToken: The sign-in response did not include an access token.
callback.securityMismatch: The sign-in session did not match this browser tab. Please start again.

today.title: Today
today.empty: No interruptions right now. We'll nudge you when it's time.
today.orient: Your calm corner of the workday. Small resets, right when they help.
today.statsUnavailable: Your stats will appear once they load.

interruptions.title: Interruptions
interruptions.intro: Live nudges as they arrive, and the history of how your day went.
interruptions.completeError: Could not complete that. Please try again.

goals.title: Goal title
goals.empty: No goals yet. Add one to get started.
goals.intro: Set the direction. Small, repeatable wins that add up.
goals.completeError: Could not complete the goal. Please try again.

badges.title: Badges
badges.empty: No badges yet. Keep completing wellness interruptions!
badges.intro: The rewards you've unlocked, and what's still within reach.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.unlockHint: Keep going to unlock this hidden milestone.
milestones.intro: Bigger moments on your journey, and how to reach them.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.signIn: Sign in to see the leaderboard.
leaderboard.intro: See how your momentum stacks up against other developers.

social.title: Social
social.bioSanitized: Content is reviewed and sanitized server-side.
social.feedEmpty: Your feed is empty. Follow others to see their activity here.
social.intro: Your public profile and what your circle is up to.

settings.title: Settings
settings.workingHoursHelp: You'll only be nudged between these hours. Outside them, devngn stays quiet and won't stack up interruptions for later.
settings.pwaAutoUpdate: PWA updates automatically in the background.
settings.intro: Tune how devngn fits your body, your gear, and your day.

profile.title: Personal setup
profile.intro: Tell us how you like to move. This shapes every nudge: intensity, pace, and what to skip.
profile.signInHint: Sign in to set up your profile.
profile.limitationsHelp: We'll avoid moves that could aggravate these.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.intro: Add the gear you have nearby. The more we know, the better we can match a break to your setup.
equipment.signInHint: Sign in to manage your equipment.
equipment.empty: No equipment yet. Add what you have nearby.
equipment.tagHelp: A short matching key the engine uses. Lowercase, no spaces.
equipment.tagLocked: The tag can't be changed after creation.
equipment.removeBody: Remove {name} from your equipment? You can add it again later.

forecast.title: What's coming
forecast.intro: A look at your next free moments and the break we'd most likely suggest. A few are left as a surprise.
forecast.empty: No free time coming up in the next couple of days. Connect a calendar to see your forecast.
forecast.surpriseSub: We'll reveal this one when it's time.
forecast.noFitSub: Nothing in your catalog fits yet. Add equipment to unlock more.
